scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @captar/types build && pnpm --filter @captar/config build && pnpm --filter @captar/utils build && turbo lint
scripts.demo:live: pnpm --filter @captar/types build && pnpm --filter @captar/config build && pnpm --filter @captar/utils build && pnpm --filter @captar/sdk build && node --env-file=demo/.env demo/live-openai-demo.mjs
